CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK(Product__c), ISBLANK(Product__r.Warranty__c)), "", IF( ((YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Invoice__r.Invoice_Date__c)) * 12 + (MONTH(TODAY()) - MONTH(Invoice__r.Invoice_Date__c))) > Product__r.Warranty__c, "Out of Warranty", "In Warranty" ) )
CustomField.label: Warranty Status
